title: agrostis stolonifera var. calcicola
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. calcicola, also known as calcicolous bent grass, is a rare and unique variant of the common bent grass. It is a perennial grass species that grows in alkaline soils and is native to certain regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of calcicolous bent grass include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. Traditional herbal preparations of calcicolous bent grass include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, fever, and skin irritations, with potential health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced overall well-being.
